title: 2026 02 03 Emily And I March Trip
html:
TL;DR

  • A 4-tab Google Doc that starts as a March trip-planning sketch with Emily Stevens (Austin → Brownsville/Matamoros → La Pesca, MX) and morphs in Tab 2 into a long, raw email-format letter Yahir sends Emily because "this is the only form of communication that feels safe to me right now."
  • Tab 1 sets the criteria — warm + affordable, March 13 onward — and locks Option 2: Austin → Brownsville (overnight US side) → La Pesca, MX, an 8.5-hour drive each way to a "quaint fishing beach town."
  • Tab 2 is the most explicit articulation of the long-distance breakdown in the Emily arc — Yahir names "i feel like I am having to prompt you for everything," compares the dynamic to "intense existential solitude," and tells Emily he doesn't want "jaded, detached energy" in either of their lives.
  • Tab 3 prices flight options Eugene/PDX/Medford → ATX (PDX cheapest at $202 round-trip) — the trip is contingent on Emily flying down.
  • Tab 4 is an off-topic Oregon-environment essay (deforestation + wildfires) — likely a pasted school-assignment fragment that doesn't belong; vault treats as orphan tab.

Core content

Tab 1 mirrors the Yahir-as-trip-architect pattern from the November Austin visit itinerary — warm/cheap/quaint criteria, drive-time math, contingencies (Colombia, Mexico City, Puerto Rico as more-touristy backups). The plan is shaped around showing Emily a side of the country she hasn't seen, with Austin as the gravity well.

Tab 2 is the load-bearing artifact. Yahir signs "With numb fingers, Yahir," and frames the letter as "good stress for both of us, ONLY if you and I actually care; if you don't care, please don't let this cause stress." Key admissions: (a) prompting fatigue — that he is the only one initiating curiosity, sharing, and silliness; (b) the "seeds of conversation" he plants that she never returns to; (c) Emily reportedly told him she "took this need to adapt as a need to detach more and care less" — a verbatim quote Yahir reproduces because it cut. The letter foreshadows the March 24 misalignment list by ~7 weeks.

Tab 3's flight-pricing math reads as Yahir performing the logistics of a relationship that's already showing strain — quietly subsidizing the asymmetric travel.

Pattern observed

This doc captures a single Yahir genre: the multi-tab Google Doc that starts as logistics and becomes a confession. Same structure as the Jan 29 letter to Emily (also a tab-letter format).

Privacy

  • Tab 2 contains intimate emotional material; Emily Stevens's name + email already cataloged in emily stevens from the Feb 26 brief; not new disclosure.
  • No credentials, phone numbers, or addresses.

Connections

  • the emily arc — parent narrative

  • 2026 01 29 letter to emily — same letter-format genre
  • 2026 03 06 emily visit — the visit this trip planning helped scaffold
  • 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment — downstream evaluation

  • post breakup conflict — adjacent template
